{{CargoClone
|name=Wolf General
|rank=purple
|cabin=2
|id=93
|gene1={race} ATK +30
|gene2={race} CIV +30
|gene3=Per 30 Demon Minions in battle:
> Troop ATK +8
|gene4=Refine +1 Green Demon God Material +1%
|gene5=Per 30 Demon Minions in battle:
> Troop ATK +12
|gene6=Refine +1 Green Demon God Material +1.5%
|}}
